MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the parties are deemed to have stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. Therefore, the Judge Pro Tem adopted the tentative ruling as the final ruling of the court. DEFENDANTS HOANG KIM, LOC TRAN's Unopposed Motion For Protective Order is granted. Defendant's deposition shall be taken at his counsel's offices in San Francisco, California. (Moving party to prepare a proposed order.) Judge Pro Tem: Conor Moore; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Not reported.
